title: New Inference Server for DGX Spark: large model C4:55-90 tok/s no spec decode
excerpt: Hi All, We are so excited to share the numbers and benchmark reports on our new inference server built specifically to run multi-model agentic workflows on DGX Spark clusters. We ran LlamaBench tests and also our own simulated traffic test on a 2 DGX Spark cluster setup and got some really good numbers. Here are the details. The full detailed report is available on our WoolyAI website.
content_html:
Hi All, We are so excited to share the numbers and benchmark reports on our new inference server built specifically to run multi-model agentic workflows on DGX Spark clusters. We ran LlamaBench tests and also our own simulated traffic test on a 2 DGX Spark cluster setup and got some really good numbers. Here are the details. The full detailed report is available on our WoolyAI website.

WoolyAI Private Multi-agent Inference Stack for DGX Spark is built to enable groups within enterprises to set up their own private, low-cost inference stacks for business agentic workflow apps. It was built with the forward-looking vision that companies will need their own private, low-cost inference setup and that single-model-based inference is not sufficient for complex enterprise workflow agentic apps. These workflows need multiple models of different specializations (hence sizes) for different steps in the workflows. Having dedicated multi-GPU inference stacks for each model is very cost-prohibitive.

First benchmark: We first ran LlamaBenchy tests on our inference server on a 2 DGX Spark cluster across 3 models with no quantization and no speculative decoding. Using speculative decoding would result in even higher numbers.

MODEL LOAD-PREFILL-SYSTEM-TOK/S DECODE-SYSTEM-TOK/S DECODE-TOK/S-PER-REQUEST

DeepSeek V4 Flash C1 1,518.91 21.15 21.15

DeepSeek V4 Flash C4 1,533.15 55.99 14.00

Gemma 4 26B A4B C1 4,579.73 30.22 30.22

Gemma 4 26B A4B C4 4,702.16 63.75 15.94

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 C1 2,607.86 39.42 39.42

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 C4 2,588.87 90.83 22.71

Second Benchmark: One endpoint, three different model-controlled activations. The scheduler batches each burst, coordinates both ranks, and changes the resident model only at a safe boundary

MODEL PREFILL-TOK/S DECODE-TOK/S Model-Activation-Wait

DeepSeek V4 Flash 4,154.34 49.30 16s

Gemma 4 26B A4B 18 4,781.44 64.67 6s

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 2,395.59 93.31 2s

We think we can improve these numbers by 20% with more optimization. Please share your feedback. https://woolyai.com/ai-compute-software/dgx-spark-inference-stack/

sentences.en: Hi All, We are so excited to share the numbers and benchmark reports on our new inference server built specifically to run multi-model agentic workflows on DGX Spark clusters.
sentences.zh: 大家好，我们非常高兴能够分享专门为在 DGX Spark 集群上运行多模型代理工作流程而构建的新推理服务器上的数据和基准测试报告。

sentences.zh: 我们在 2 个 DGX Spark 集群设置上运行了 LlamaBench 测试以及我们自己的模拟流量测试，并得到了一些非常好的数据。
以下是详细信息。

These workflows need multiple models of different specializations (hence sizes) for different steps in the workflows. Having dedicated multi-GPU inference stacks for each model is very cost-prohibitive.

sentences.en: WoolyAI Private Multi-agent Inference Stack for DGX Spark is built to enable groups within enterprises to set up their own private, low-cost inference stacks for business agentic workflow apps.

sentences.zh: 它的构建具有前瞻性的愿景，即公司将需要自己的私有、低成本推理设置，并且基于单一模型的推理不足以满足复杂的企业工作流代理应用程序。

sentences.en: These workflows need multiple models of different specializations (hence sizes) for different steps in the workflows.
sentences.zh: 这些工作流程需要针对工作流程中的不同步骤使用不同专业化（因此大小）的多个模型。

sentences.en: Having dedicated multi-GPU inference stacks for each model is very cost-prohibitive.
sentences.zh: 为每个模型配备专用的多 GPU 推理堆栈的成本非常高昂。

blocks.html_en: First benchmark: We first ran LlamaBenchy tests on our inference server on a 2 DGX Spark cluster across 3 models with no quantization and no speculative decoding. Using speculative decoding would result in even higher numbers.

sentences.en: Using speculative decoding would result in even higher numbers.
sentences.zh: 使用推测解码会导致更高的数字。

blocks.html_en: Second Benchmark: One endpoint, three different model-controlled activations. The scheduler batches each burst, coordinates both ranks, and changes the resident model only at a safe boundary

sentences.en: Second Benchmark: One endpoint, three different model-controlled activations.
sentences.zh: 第二个基准：一个端点，三种不同的模型控制激活。

sentences.en: The scheduler batches each burst, coordinates both ranks, and changes the resident model only at a safe boundary
sentences.zh: 调度程序对每个突发进行批处理，协调两个等级，并仅在安全边界更改驻留模型
模型预填充-TOK/S 解码-TOK/S 模型-激活-等待

请分享您的反馈。

content_html_zh:
大家好，我们非常高兴能够分享专门为在 DGX Spark 集群上运行多模型代理工作流程而构建的新推理服务器上的数据和基准测试报告。 我们在 2 个 DGX Spark 集群设置上运行了 LlamaBench 测试以及我们自己的模拟流量测试，并得到了一些非常好的数据。 以下是详细信息。 完整详细的报告可在我们的 WoolyAI 网站上找到。

适用于 DGX Spark 的 WoolyAI 私有多代理推理堆栈旨在使企业内部的团队能够为业务代理工作流应用程序建立自己的私有、低成本推理堆栈。 它的构建具有前瞻性的愿景，即公司将需要自己的私有、低成本推理设置，并且基于单一模型的推理不足以满足复杂的企业工作流代理应用程序。 这些工作流程需要针对工作流程中的不同步骤使用不同专业化（因此大小）的多个模型。 为每个模型配备专用的多 GPU 推理堆栈的成本非常高昂。

第一个基准测试：我们首先在 2 个 DGX Spark 集群上的推理服务器上跨 3 个模型运行 LlamaBenchy 测试，没有量化，也没有推测性解码。 使用推测解码会导致更高的数字。

模型加载-预填充-系统-TOK/S 解码-系统-TOK/S 解码-TOK/S-每个请求

DeepSeek V4 闪存 C1 1,518.91 21.15 21.15

DeepSeek V4 闪存 C4 1,533.15 55.99 14.00

杰玛 4 26B A4B C1 4,579.73 30.22 30.22

杰玛 4 26B A4B C4 4,702.16 63.75 15.94

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 C1 2,607.86 39.42 39.42

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 C4 2,588.87 90.83 22.71

第二个基准：一个端点，三种不同的模型控制激活。 调度程序对每个突发进行批处理，协调两个等级，并仅在安全边界更改驻留模型

模型预填充-TOK/S 解码-TOK/S 模型-激活-等待

DeepSeek V4 闪存 4,154.34 49.30 16s

杰玛 4 26B A4B 18 4,781.44 64.67 6s

Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 30B NVFP4 2,395.59 93.31 2s

我们认为通过更多优化可以将这些数字提高 20%。 请分享您的反馈。 https://woolyai.com/ai-compute-software/dgx-spark-inference-stack/
